name: stock-analysis
description: Financial analysis plugin for Claude — SEC EDGAR fundamentals and real-time Reddit + Stocktwits sentiment for any stock ticker.

plugins.name: stock-analysis
plugins.description: 8 tools covering SEC EDGAR fundamentals (income statement, balance sheet, cash flow, 20+ financial ratios) and real-time social sentiment (Reddit + Stocktwits). Includes 7 prompt-driven skills that produce full structured reports from a single slash command.
